name: Feed
goal: Render a reverse-chronological stream of homogeneous entries with optional time-bucket grouping for activity logs, social feeds, audit trails, release notes, and notifications.
description: Container element that sorts and groups ce-feed-entry children (or a data array) into a vertical chronological list. Supports day, week, and month bucket grouping with sticky group headers, newest-first or oldest-first ordering, and a dense spacing mode. Re-groups on every slotchange so streaming entry appends are handled without manual refresh. Two-element pair: ce-feed (container) + ce-feed-entry (item). Accepts both slot children and a data array (CDR-005). Satisfies the ARIA 1.1 feed pattern with role=feed on the container and role=article on each entry.
limitations: No virtualization — renders all entries directly. For feeds exceeding ~1000 entries consider a ce-virtual-scroller wrapper (v2 path). The 'Today' / 'Yesterday' labels are computed relative to the client's local time at render; they are not updated reactively as the clock passes midnight.

props.name: groupBy
props.description: Bucket grouping mode. 'none' renders entries in a flat list with no group headers. 'day', 'week', 'month' insert sticky group headers above each bucket.

props.name: order
props.description: Sort direction. 'newest' shows the most recent entry first. 'oldest' shows the earliest entry first.

props.name: dense
props.description: Reduces vertical padding between entries for compact feeds.

props.name: data
props.description: Data array path (CDR-005). Array of { time, content? } objects. When non-empty, slot children are ignored. Accepts JSON string on the attribute or a JS array on the property.

slots.description: ce-feed-entry children. Ignored when the data property is non-empty (CDR-005).

cssVariables.name: --ce-surface
cssVariables.description: Sticky group header background (inherits the page surface so headers occlude entries on scroll).

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Group header label color and entry dot color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Default entry vertical padding and group header bottom margin.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Gap between entry dot and entry content; group header top padding.

globalDependencies.purpose: Locale-friendly group header labels (month names, date formatting).

sideEffects.description: Sets role='feed' on the host element on connectedCallback if the attribute is not already present.
sideEffects.reason: ARIA 1.1 feed pattern requires role=feed on the container.

interchangeableWith.when: homogeneous items without time-bucket grouping; ce-feed adds chronological grouping

a11y.notes: Host has role='feed' (ARIA 1.1). Each ce-feed-entry sets role='article' on connectedCallback. Group headers have role='presentation' — they are visual-only separators. The .ce-feed__list wrapper has aria-live='polite' so screen readers announce newly appended entries.

nondeterministicReason: Reads wall-clock time during render to compute 'Today' / 'Yesterday' / 'This week' group labels relative to the current date (see #computeGroups in feed.ts; documented in limitations).
